hook.summary: A hand triggers a massive, satisfying chain reaction on a match-3 board.
hook.visual_action: A hand taps a special candy, causing a large explosion of candies and coins around a central gift box.
hook.text_overlay: Candy story NO ADS AND FREE DOWNLOAD

scene_flow: Initial match-3 board setup with a large gift box in the center and a hand pointing to a move.
A massive chain reaction of matching candies and collecting coins/pigs is triggered.
Continued gameplay showing more matches and the gift box shaking as rewards accumulate.
audience_proxy: Casual puzzle players who enjoy satisfying match-3 mechanics and reward-heavy gameplay.
